display.purpose: Screen-defining titles and major milestones only.

label.purpose: Short navigation and state labels only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single dominant action on an operational state.

components.name: Contribution Button
components.description: Field contribution action; never a decorative secondary accent.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action with a visible boundary and full touch target.

components.name: Operational Card
components.description: A distinct actionable surface on Field Paper.
components.html:
Collection area

Verified points and next captures.

components.name: Active Filter Chip
components.description: Selected filter with text and color-independent active semantics.

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Visible label, 48px minimum control, and resilient bilingual measure.
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;gap:6px;color:#1f2933;font:600 13px/1.4 Inter,system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-field input{min-height:48px;padding:0 14px;border:1px solid #d5e1eb;border-radius:14px;background:#fff;color:#1f2933;font:400 16px/1.5 Inter,system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-field input:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #0f2b46;outline-offset:2px;border-color:#0f2b46}

narrative.overview: African Data Layer feels like a dependable instrument used in motion: decisive enough for one-handed field capture, calm enough for review, and specific enough to make trustworthy provenance visible. The system is light-mode-first, map-native, and operational.
keyCharacteristics: Daylight-readable surfaces with Operational Navy as the primary action and navigation color.
Signal Terracotta reserved for contribution momentum and the most important field action.
Verification Forest and Progress Gold communicate trusted state and earned progress.
Familiar map and platform patterns, 48px minimum touch targets, bilingual resilience, and purposeful motion.

rules.name: The Operational First Rule
rules.body: Every visual flourish must improve clarity, motivation, or trust.

rules.name: The Restrained Signal Rule
rules.body: On product screens, accent color marks primary action, current selection, status, or progress.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadow never substitutes for hierarchy; it only clarifies physical stacking or a floating control.

rules.name: The One Primary Action Rule
rules.body: Each operational state exposes one unmistakable next action; secondary actions recede.

dos: Do design for bright sunlight, one-handed use, intermittent connectivity, and limited battery as default conditions.
Do keep primary mobile touch targets at least 48px.
Do preserve English/French parity and allow at least 30% text expansion.
donts: Don't use neon, crypto-style, or glossy dark-dashboard aesthetics.
Don't add decorative game effects that compete with field tasks.
Don't use low-contrast premium minimalism that fails outdoors.
Don't force dense desktop controls onto narrow mobile screens.
Don't block the interface with a portrait-only orientation demand.
